rules.rule: Pages MUST use page hooks for data fetching and business logic.
Pages MUST be in src/pages/ directory.
Page files MUST follow pattern {Domain}Page.tsx (e.g., DashboardPage.tsx).
Pages MUST compose reusable components, not duplicate rendering logic.
Pages MUST handle route-level concerns only (layout, navigation, hook orchestration).
Pages MUST export as named exports, not default exports.
Pages MUST NOT contain business logic.
Pages MUST NOT fetch data directly (use hooks).
Pages MUST NOT call services directly.
Pages MUST handle loading/error states from hooks.
Pages MUST use exactly one page hook.
Pages MUST use early returns for loading/error states.
Pages MUST compose components, not inline all JSX.
Pages MUST NOT duplicate component logic.
